description: Read-only package mode / phase overview for the boiler-like Wave 13 reference domain.

members.boundary_note: Wave 13 only summarizes child supervisory state into package mode / phase metadata.
members.title: Boiler Supervisor Core

members.boundary_note: Flow availability remains child-owned and is only referenced by package mode / phase metadata.
members.title: Flow Guard

members.boundary_note: Maintenance remains downstream and package-level mode / phase stays execution-neutral.
members.title: Boiler Maintenance Counter

boundary_notes: Package mode / phase remains a generic package orchestration metadata layer only.
BoilerSupervisorModes v1 is boiler-like reference content only and does not introduce burner execution.

mode_groups.summary: Off and standby remain the non-running supervisory modes.

mode_groups.summary: Run remains the active control-oriented mode.

phase_summary_entries.summary: Run phase follows the core run lane.
